metadata.description: tempfile: Here is the English translation with brief Python code examples for each: 1. tempfile.TemporaryFile(auto-delete) Python example: ```python import tempfile # Create a temporary file that will be deleted when closed or garbage collected with tempfile.TemporaryFile() as temp: temp.write(b'Some data') ``` 2. NamedTemporaryFile Python example: ```python import tempfile # Create a named temporary file with a specific name and delete it on close temp_file = tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(delete=True, suffix='.txt', prefix='my_temp_') print(temp_file.name) # Print the filename of the created temporary file ``` 3. mkdtemp Python example: ```python import tempfile # Create a named directory (folder) for temporary files and delete it on close temp_dir = tempfile.mkdtemp(dir='/tmp', prefix='my_temp_') print(temp_dir) # Print the path of the created temporary directory ``` Note: The term "安全临时文件" is translated as "safe temporary file," but in context, it seems to refer more to the safe handling and deletion of these files rather than a specific feature.
